objectives: Prefer selective corrections over broad reruns when scope is unchanged.
Keep public-safe conclusions narrower than private reviewer notes when evidence is partial.
control_decision_rules: Do not convert missing evidence into a passing control.
Use not_assessed or partial when provider coverage is insufficient.
Escalate to rerun when upstream classification, threat framing, or evidence selection is materially wrong.
evidence_requirements: Repository-visible claims should cite deterministic source evidence when available.
Public-facing findings should avoid overclaiming beyond the audited snapshot.
Tool execution failures reduce assessability; they do not strengthen failure conclusions by themselves.
publication_rules: Differentiate repository-visible posture from organizational or runtime posture.
Treat policy-sensitive or company-specific conclusions as review-scoped unless direct evidence supports publication.
